name: STM32H562 LQFP64
description: Generated from the STM32H562 alternate-function workbook and STM32H562AG datasheet for STM32H562 LQFP64. This definition models the LQFP64 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32H562 devices move into the wider-pin-count H5 class with external memory, Ethernet-capable routing, and denser communication fabric. This package definition exposes 59 peripheral blocks covering 12 timers, 6 low-power timers, 10 serial ports, 5 SPI controllers, 3 I2S interfaces, 4 I2C controllers, 2 serial audio interfaces, 2 SDMMC host interfaces, 2 FDCAN controllers, an Ethernet MAC interface, 2 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, a digital camera interface, 1 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controller, and 1 USB interface.
